string.name: high_quality_desp
string.value: Capture %dMP images in Photo mode. Images may take slightly longer to process at this resolution.

string.name: menu_remark_voice_capture_disable
string.value: Not available when Moving picture is on.

string.name: menu_remark_mute_disable
string.value: Shutter sound is muted when taking moving pictures.

string.name: high_pixel_desc
string.value: AI Ultra Clarity is great for shooting still objects and scenery in good light.

string.name: high_pixel_desc_common
string.value: AI Ultra Clarity is great for shooting still objects and scenery in good light.

string.name: night_capture_desc
string.value:
Keep the device steady.
Wait for the countdown or tap the shutter to capture a photo.

string.name: night_view_details
string.value: Thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm, your phone can capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions. ISO and shutter speed can be adjusted manually for more creative shots. When using the front camera to take portraits, the phone provides fill lighting to eliminate unwanted shadows on the subject's face. Selfies taken at night also come out clear and bright.

string.name: snapshot_details
string.value: The super-focus camera system integrates the XD Motion engine to capture subjects moving at speeds of up to %d km/h, whether you are shooting up close or from a distance.

string.name: portrait_details
string.value: Portrait mode allows you to take beautiful photos with a bokeh effect in the background.

string.name: photo_details
string.value: The camera automatically adjusts the exposure and color when you take photos.

string.name: video_details
string.value: The camera automatically adjusts the exposure and color when you shoot HD video.

string.name: professional_details
string.value: Fine-tune your camera settings to get just the shot you're looking for. Pro mode lets you adjust a host of advanced settings such as metering, ISO, shutter speed, exposure value (EV), white balance, and focus mode.

string.name: slow_details
string.value: Capture slow-motion video without length restrictions. Super slow-mo can be used to manually or automatically capture video at ultra-high frame rates. This mode works best in brightly lit environments.

string.name: panorama_details
string.value: Move the camera horizontally or vertically to take a panoramic photo.

string.name: light_painting_details
string.value: Create special light and shadow effects. Choose from four preset modes (traffic trails, light graffiti, silky water, and star trails) tailored to the most common light painting scenarios. For best results, use a tripod.

string.name: macro_details
string.value: Take extreme close-ups with the rear camera, and capture the vivid details of the world around you.

string.name: high_res_details
string.value: High resolution photography has a higher pixel density, for greater clarity and detail.

string.name: wide_aperture_details
string.value: With a wider aperture, you can capture your subject in detail while creating a soft bokeh effect in the background. For best results, the distance between the camera and the subject should be no more than %d meters.

string.name: security_confirm_permissions_needed_new
string.value: To display the photos and videos you take, this app requires the %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, and %4$s permissions, and needs to read image, video, and location information.

string.name: photo_iso_value
string.value: Some settings aren't available at this ISO value.

string.name: photo_profession_af_unlock_able
string.value: Focus can only be locked in AF-C.

string.name: photo_profession_no_awb_vest
string.value: White balance can only be locked in AWB mode.

string.name: Aperture_adjustment_is_not_supported
string.value: Can't manually adjust aperture at this focal length.

string.value: Device too hot. Flash is not available.

string.name: left_right_swipe_toast
string.value: Swipe sideways for burst shot or video.

string.name: time_lapse_details
string.value: Capture the essence of change with videos that speed up the passage of time.

string.name: light_painting_help_content_text
string.value: You can use the camera's flash to capture people while shooting in this mode.

string.value: Device too hot. Flash is not available.

string.value: Your device is too hot. Camera will close in %1$d seconds.

Ideal for cars and crowds

string.name: collaborate_recommend_tip
string.value: Tap here to let your subject see the preview too.

string.name: fluorescence_notice
string.value: As the fluorescent effect is faint, best results are achieved in very dark environments. Please exercise caution when using this mode.

string.name: fluorescence_usage1
string.value: %s Please ensure that you read this notice in full before using this mode.

string.name: fluorescence_usage3
string.value: %s By using this mode, you indicate that you have read, understood, agreed to, and accepted all terms stated in this notice.

string.name: fluorescence_usage2
string.value: %1$s The fill light used in this product complies with the %2$s safety standard.

string.name: fluorescence_use_tip
string.value: Shoot in the dark for the best results.

string.name: is_dirty_lens
string.value: Image is blurry. Try wiping the lens.

string.name: fluorescence_introduce
string.value: Fluorescence photography is a camera mode which uses a UV fill light. When re-emitted from certain materials, the UV light gives off fluorescent colors which can be captured as stylized photographs.

string.name: click_new_mode_guide
string.value: Capture moments in a whole new way.

string.name: Raw_format_zoom_is_not_supported
string.value: Zoom is not supported in RAW mode.

string.name: hint_when_enter_panorama_follow_arrow_new
string.value: Tap the shutter and move the camera slowly in the direction of the arrow.

string.name: smile_capture_desp
string.value: Automatically take photos when people smile.

string.name: Wind_noise_suppression_detail
string.value: Reduce wind noise during video recording to make voices sound clearer.

string.name: panorama_details_more
string.value: Slowly pan the camera either horizontally or vertically, while keeping it as steady as possible. Keep the arrow level with the center line. When you finish shooting, the camera will automatically combine everything you've captured into a panoramic photo. This mode is great for landscapes and big group photos.

string.name: light_painting_details_new
string.value: Extra-slow shutter speeds allow you to create ethereal effects with light. There are four preset modes, tailored to common light painting scenarios (Traffic trails, Light graffiti, Silky water, and Star trails).

string.name: guidance_xmage_desc
string.value: Photos are more vivid and textured, allowing you to better capture pets and scenery.

string.name: guidance_portrait_desc
string.value: In Portrait mode, you can use beauty effects and get different kinds of bokeh by adjusting the aperture.

string.name: macro_details_more
string.value: A closer focus distance allows you to capture your subject in minute detail. Super macro can be used for both photos and videos.

string.name: snapshot_details_new
string.value: Capture clearer pictures of subjects in motion.

string.name: portrait_details_more
string.value: In Portrait mode, you can use beauty effects and get different kinds of bokeh by adjusting the aperture. Exposure and color are adjusted automatically as you shoot, to give you the best possible photos.

string.name: guidance_new_interaction_desc
string.value: The zoom ring has been replaced with fan zoom. In addition, you can touch & hold the shutter button and then swipe left to take a burst shot, swipe right to record video, or swipe up to zoom.

string.name: professional_details_new
string.value: In Pro mode, you can freely adjust advanced parameters to get just the shot you're looking for.

string.name: guidance_new_zoom_desc
string.value: The new fan zoom brings you a smoother, more convenient zoom experience.

string.name: high_res_details_more
string.value: High resolution photography has a higher pixel density, for greater clarity and detail. In High-res mode, photos may take a little longer to produce. Hold the phone steady until the process is complete.

string.name: light_painting_details_more
string.value: Extra-slow shutter speeds allow you to create ethereal effects with light. There are four preset modes, tailored to common light painting scenarios (Traffic trails, Light graffiti, Silky water, and Star trails). For best results, use a tripod.

string.name: night_view_details_short
string.value: Night mode allows you to capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions, thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm.

string.name: wide_aperture_details_more
string.value: With a wider aperture, you can capture your subject in detail while creating a soft bokeh effect in the background. For best results, the distance between the camera and the subject should be no more than %d meters. This mode lets you control both physical and virtual apertures.

string.name: professional_details_more
string.value: In Pro mode, you can freely adjust a host of advanced camera settings to get just the shot you're looking for. These include metering, ISO, aperture, shutter speed, exposure value (EV), white balance, and focus mode, among others.

string.name: raw_format_zoom_only_supported_pinch
string.value: In RAW mode, zoom can only be adjusted by tapping the presets or pinching.

string.name: stitching_details_more
string.value: Smoothly rotate your phone as guided while keeping it steady. After you've completed your shot, the camera will combine the captured images into a panoramic photo. This feature is great for shooting landscapes, cityscapes, and similar scenes.

string.name: pitch_angle_intro_text

string.name: new_night_view_details_short
string.value: Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Four shooting modes are available: Super nightshot, Moon shot, Starry sky, and Starry portrait.

string.name: new_night_two_view_details_short
string.value: Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Two shooting modes are available: Super nightshot and Moon shot.

string.name: new_night_view_details
string.value: Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Four shooting modes are available: Super nightshot, Moon shot, Starry sky, and Starry portrait. When the front camera is used, the device's screen will increase its brightness to provide extra light, allowing faces to appear bright and clear even in the dark.

string.name: new_night_two_view_details
string.value: Capture sharp, bright images in low-light conditions thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm. Two shooting modes are available: Super nightshot and Moon shot. When the front camera is used, the device's screen can increase its brightness to provide extra light, allowing faces to appear bright and clear even in the dark.

string.value: Thanks to an advanced noise-reduction algorithm, your phone can capture sharp, bright images even in low-light conditions. Shutter speed can be adjusted manually for more creative shots. When using the front camera to take portraits, the phone provides fill lighting to eliminate unwanted shadows, ensuring that faces come out clear and bright.

string.name: custom_filter_card_desc
string.value: Swipe left or right to switch between custom styles. Create your own styles by swiping on the color card, or emulate someone else's by importing a photo they took.

string.name: ai_composition_desc
string.value: AI can suggest the optimal framing for your photo. Simply line your device up and the zoom will adjust automatically. Works best with scenery, buildings, and people.

string.name: high_definition_panorama_desc
string.value: Slowly rotate the camera either horizontally or vertically to take a panoramic photo. This is great for capturing sweeping scenes, like mountains and skylines, in striking detail.

string.name: ai_composition_open_intro_toast
string.value: AI composition can be used at %1$sx, %2$sx, or %3$sx camera zoom. Results are best when taking photos of scenery, buildings, and people.

string.name: security_confirm_permissions_needed
string.value: This app requires the %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s permissions. To display the photos and videos you take, it needs to read images, videos, and location information. It may also need to use the microphone to record audio.

string.value: Stage mode is great for shooting gigs, concerts, plays, and other performances.

string.name: stage_details_more_nova
string.value: Stage mode is great for shooting gigs, concerts, plays, and other performances. It's optimized to perform well in scenarios with complex stage lighting, so you can capture performers in crisp detail and vivid color.

string.name: stage_details_flagship
string.value: This mode is optimized for shooting concerts and other stage performances.

string.name: stage_details_more_flagship
string.value: This mode is optimized for shooting concerts and other stage performances, so you can capture performers and lighting effects in crisp detail and vivid color. This mode can be used for both photos and videos.
